Dialog.name: SYS_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you load the data you save here, you will start the game over, carrying over certain attributes from your clear data.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you overwrite the original save, you will be unable to continue playing from that point in the game.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you upload your clear data to the network, you will only be able to load it through the network. We recommend you save clear data to the console.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Clear data has not been saved to the console. Are you sure you want to return to the title screen?[n]{f 1 1}
